title: CORE — Personal Health History
description: Breast biopsy and benign breast disease (BBD) history. Up to four BBD diagnoses are stored wide; unused slots take the NA sentinel (777 for type, 7777 for year).

Biopsies_yesno.title: Ever had a breast biopsy (excluding biopsies leading to a cancer diagnosis in cases)

Biopsies_number.title: Number of breast biopsies (excluding biopsies leading to a breast cancer diagnosis in cases)
Biopsies_number.description: See COHORT_METADATA.biopsynum_def for how the number of biopsies was determined.

BBD_number.title: Number of benign breast disease diagnoses
BBD_number.$comment: Source coding: number 0-4; 5 - more than 4; 888 - Missing/Unknown. Top-coded categorical, not a free integer.

BBD_type1.title: Type of benign breast disease for first BBD diagnosis

BBD_year1.title: Year of diagnosis of first benign breast disease diagnosis

BBD_type2.title: Type of benign breast disease for second BBD diagnosis

BBD_year2.title: Year of diagnosis of second benign breast disease diagnosis

BBD_type3.title: Type of benign breast disease for third BBD diagnosis

BBD_year3.title: Year of diagnosis of third benign breast disease diagnosis

BBD_type4.title: Type of benign breast disease for fourth BBD diagnosis

BBD_year4.title: Year of diagnosis of fourth benign breast disease diagnosis

bbd_type.$comment: Source coding: 1 - non-proliferative disease; 2 - proliferative disease without atypia; 3 - atypical hyperplasia; 777 - NA; 888 - Missing/Unknown.

bbd_year.$comment: Source coding: yyyy; 7777 - NA; 8888 - Missing/Unknown. (Some slots typed 'Date' in source but are 4-digit calendar years.)
